name: audio
description: Speech-to-text transcription (Voicebox Whisper) and text-to-speech generation (Voicebox TTS with voice cloning). Use when the user wants to: transcribe audio, convert speech to text, read text aloud, text-to-speech, TTS, STT, transcribe a voice message, generate speech, clone a voice, speak in a specific language, use a voice profile, or list voice profiles.

request.description: What to do: transcribe audio, generate speech, manage profiles

text.description: Text to speak (for TTS, max 5000 chars)

language.description: Language code: en, zh, ja, ko, de, fr, ru, pt, es, it

profile_id.description: Voice profile ID (for TTS with voice cloning)
